question: Is there a limit on file uploads during the Free Trial?
answer: No, you can upload standard PDF, Word, and scan files. The only limit for the Trial is that you can generate up to 3 separate document bundles (cases) to test annotations and export capabilities.

question: What happens when my 14-day trial ends?
answer: We do not request a credit card for the trial! At the end of the 14 days, your account will enter a read-only state. You can upgrade to the Pro plan at any time to resume editing.

question: How does 'Advanced OCR & Bates Stamping' work in the Pro Plan?
answer: Our Advanced OCR automatically extracts searchable text from scanned PDFs and images, with full automatic language detection. Seamlessly insert customized, sequential Bates page stamps for secure courtroom filings.

question: Can I invite team members to my Shared Workspaces?
answer: Absolutely! The Pro Plan includes dynamic sharing controls. You can invite other legal counsels, paralegals, or clients with read-only view or full editor privileges.

question: What is your data security and retention policy?
answer: We understand legal files are highly confidential. Case Builder uses AES-256 enterprise encryption at-rest and TLS 1.3 in-transit. We strictly do not train external LLM models on your uploaded client files.
